content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom C:7 (carbon with index 7) and its neighboring atoms. Looking at the molecular structure:

Atom C:7 is directly bonded to:
- N:8 (nitrogen, atomic index 8)
- C:6 (carbon, atomic index 6)
- C:9 (carbon, atomic index 9)

These three atoms are covalently connected to C:7, forming part of a ring structure.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file information in the working directory, I can see the file "geomconf_2368.xyz", which indicates that the geomconf_index for this molecule is 2368.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 7 (C) are:
- Atomic index 6, element C
- Atomic index 8, element N
- Atomic index 9, element C

Geomconf_index: 2368

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
